hypothesis_en: Mr President, although the shamelessness and the ability to provoke in some seems to have no limit, it is surprising that a reference is made to an apparent defence of human rights by the only member of this House who has not been able to condemn one of the attacks committed by his friends, the cowardly murderers of the ETA terrorist gang.
reference_en: thank you President the= (3.7) there (1.27) are no limits to the capacity of some people to provoke us it's still not surprising that to= reference being made to the defence of human rights by the only Member of this House who has never been capable of condemning any of the terrorist acts which have been committed by his cowardly friends the murders from the ETA terrorist group (1.16) now obviously it is it it is very wrong to damage or t= take people's lives but it is also wrong for people even worse for people to use the= the= their their presence in this House to defend what is indefensible the only consolation we have President is that this sort of of manifestation against the position of the Parliament which d= d= denies the rights of the victims we won't have to hear these during the next parliamentary term thank you very much
source_es: muchas gracias señor Presidente aunque la desvergüenza y la capacidad de provocar en algunos parece que no tiene límite no je= no deja de sorprender que se haga una referencia a una aparente defensa de los derechos humanos por el único miembro de esta Cámara que no ha sido capaz de condenar uno solo de los atentados cometidos por sus amigos los cobardes asesinos de la banda terrorista ETA y si es grave y condenable señor Presidente el atentar contra el derecho a la vida más grave es todavía el prevalerse de la libertad que con= que confiere el ser miembro de esta Cámara para mediante la palabra o mediante el silencio culpable justificar lo injustificable o defender lo indefendible señor Presidente el único consuelo que nos queda es que este tipo de manifestaciones insolidarias contrarias a las posiciones del Parlamento y que menosprecian las los derechos de las víctimas señor Presidente no tendremos que escucharlos por intera= por imperativo legal en la próxima legislatura muchas gracias
